productDisplayName: Spykar Women Ep Jeans Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue jeans with a washed look, made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with stitch detailing, comfortable waist with loops and a brand patch, and a button and zipper closure on the front Fit Slim fit Regular rise Wash care Wash inside out separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade The manually treated denim with the heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of blue jeans from spykar, while the cotton and spandex fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to accomodate your body movements. Team it with a t-shirt and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 5'8& rdquo and waist 28"
